scripts.build: pnpm --filter @typeless-open/shared build && pnpm --filter @typeless-open/voice-flow build && pnpm --filter @typeless-open/server build && pnpm --filter @typeless-open/desktop build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @typeless-open/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @typeless-open/voice-flow typecheck && pnpm --filter @typeless-open/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @typeless-open/desktop typecheck
